title: stenolobium molle
intro: Stenolobium molle, also known as the velvet leaf or soft stenolobium, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stenolobium molle include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
